name: chaos-substrate
description: Agent guidance and wrappers for using Chaos Substrate code knowledge memory in Rust, TypeScript, and JavaScript projects.

interface.shortDescription: Index projects and generate feature memory.
interface.longDescription: Agent workflow and helper commands for initializing, updating, querying, and generating feature-memory websites with the Rust-only Chaos Substrate code knowledge memory.
defaultPrompt: Index this project with Chaos Substrate.
